items.claim: Bernson Rivero is not a good fighter in the UFC.
Magomed Chuchabs likes to strike, keep the fight standing, and apply pressure.
items.quote: pretty much ultimately likes to strike and um likes to keep the fight a stand and bang and puts pressure into his opponent.

items.claim: Mamed is inexperienced with a 6-0 record.
items.quote: Mamed is only 6 and0 so very inexperienced.

items.claim: Magomed Chuchabs has power in his hands and great striking.
items.quote: the dude has power in his hands. The dude has great striking

items.claim: Magomed Chuchabs will knock out Brenson Rivero within the first two rounds.
items.quote: Maggamemed Chuchabs is just pretty much coming here and knock out Brenson uh Brenson Rivero within the first two.
